notes: Recognizable squid-shaped silhouette in roughly the right pose, but fin reads as a fish tail, the two long tentacles from the photo are missing, and stipple is noisy photo-trace rather than disciplined FAO chromatophore field.
specific_issues: posterior fin rendered as pointed fish-tail rather than the rhombic Loligo fin seen in the photo
long left/right tentacles from the photo are truncated to short stubs
no almond eye with pupil drawn at the eye position
stippling is randomly scattered noise rather than aligned with the dorsal chromatophore band visible in the photo
spurious notches and bumps along the mantle outline (top edge has a step, dorsal contour is irregular)
small detached fragment near the upper-right arm cluster breaks the silhouette
arm mass on right is a clumped blob rather than discrete arms with sucker rows
